name: jsalt
description: jsalt plugin exposing JSA docs-oriented workflows and jsa-ast validation commands

install_guidance.note: Use 'supercli plugins learn jsalt' to load agent-focused JSALT syntax, patterns, and examples before generating .jsa applications.

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install jsalt globally: npm install -g jsalt
